feed.title: Journal of South Asian Languages and Linguistics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Journal of South Asian Languages and Linguistics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: The New Indo-Aryanb-future and the early Middle Indo-Aryan of Aśokan inscriptions
entry.summary: Authors: Eugen Hill DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jsall-2025-0009 Pages: Page range: 1-21

entry.title: Reconstructing the relationship between Hindi-Urdu and Dakani: a diachronic dialectological approach
entry.summary: Authors: Joshua H. Pien DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jsall-2025-0006 Pages: Page range: 23-64

entry.title: The sound system of Jādobātī Brajbhāshā
entry.summary: Authors: Pramod Rathor, Sansuma Brahma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jsall-2025-0013 Pages: Page range: 65-97

entry.title: Sound correspondences among Zeme, Liangmai, and Rongmei: a comparative analysis of cognate sets and alternating reflex
entry.summary: Authors: ID Raguibou DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jsall-2025-0015 Pages: Page range: 99-140
